data.title: Create gptme command understanding epic
data.description:
## Summary

Build a concise reference for the core `gptme-*` command surface used in this workspace, with practical purpose/when-to-use notes and one working example per command.

## Context

This already exists as an active local epic in `gptodo`, but it does not yet have a GitHub issue to anchor worktree/PR-based execution.

## Acceptance Criteria

* a first batch of command subtasks is completed and documented in `knowledge/`
* the local epic and any spawned subtasks are linked cleanly to this issue
* follow-up work can be split into focused PRs instead of one large branch
